sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("=== Key objects ===")
for n in nodes:
    c = n['color']
    if c in ['W', 'p', 'M', 'G'] and n['pixels'] <= 25:
        if n['boundary']:
            rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            center = f"~({sum(rows)//len(rows)}, {sum(cols)//len(cols)})"
        else:
            center = "?"
        print(f"  {c} id={n['id']} px={n['pixels']} children={n['children']} {center}")

# Check what changed
if previous_frame:
    prev_nodes = {n['color']: n for n in previous_frame.segmentation['nodes'] if n['pixels'] <= 25}
    curr_nodes = {n['color']: n for n in nodes if n['pixels'] <= 25}
    print("\n=== Diff ===")
    for c in ['W', 'p', 'M', 'G']:
        if c in prev_nodes and c in curr_nodes:
            prev = prev_nodes[c]
            curr = curr_nodes[c]
            if prev['hash'] != curr['hash']:
                print(f"  {c}: hash changed {prev['hash']} -> {curr['hash']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
